title: Dynamic Lane Management
description:
You are managing a lane where people stand in order. Initially, N people are present in the lane.
You are then given M operations. Each operation is either insertion or deletion at a specified
position. Process all operations efficiently and output the final order.
inputFormat:
N
N integers
M
(type position value)
explanation: Efficient insert/delete operations require a linked list or balanced structure.

title: Kth Largest Without Sorting
description:
Given an array of integers and an integer K, return the Kth largest element. Sorting is not allowed.
The solution must be optimized.
explanation: Maintain a min-heap of size K to track the K largest elements.
